scenario: Helios Health runs Camunda 8.8 with 1500 instances. For one instance the operator wants to move every running token from the Triage flow node to the Specialist Review flow node, capturing the relocation as a single pending change in the instance history before applying it to the running data.
question: Which workflow performs the documented Move instance modification on a single process instance in Operate?

options.text: The operator selects the source flow node, picks Move instance from its dropdown, then selects the target flow node, and the relocation appears as a pending modification in the instance history
The operator drags the running tokens from the source flow node onto the target flow node in the diagram, and Operate applies the move directly without showing any pending modification
The operator opens the variables panel, sets a moveTargetActivityId variable to the target flow node id, then refreshes the instance view so the broker reschedules the tokens to the target
The operator selects the source flow node and clicks Move instance, and the relocation completes immediately for all instances on that flow node across the cluster without any further input

a.text: Correct. The docs describe the move modification as selecting the source flow node, clicking Move instance, then selecting the target flow node; the pending move is then reflected in the instance history before being applied.

b.text: Incorrect. Operate does not move tokens through drag-and-drop on the diagram, and modifications are always staged as pending entries before being applied to the instance.

c.text: Incorrect. There is no moveTargetActivityId variable that drives a relocation; the move is configured through the flow node dropdown in modification mode, not through a hidden variable name.

d.text: Incorrect. The move modification operates on the single open instance and requires selecting a target flow node; it does not fan out across every instance running on that flow node cluster-wide.

explanation: The Move instance modification is performed by selecting the source flow node, choosing Move instance from the dropdown, then selecting the target flow node. The relocation is then staged as a pending modification reflected in the instance history.
